subject: Fermi GBM trigger 466059859/151009211 is not a GRB
body:
E. Bissaldi (INFN Bari) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:


"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 466059859/151009211
at 05:04:15.57 UT on 9 October 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB.
This trigger is due to particle activity."
